title: Michigan Chapter of the National Association of Disability Examiners — Constitution
description: Governing constitution of the Michigan Chapter of the National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE), structured as a statewide chapter composed of independent, autonomous subchapters based on Michigan DDS service areas. Covers chapter name, NADE relationship, definitions (including subchapters), purpose, membership and powers, the Board of Directors (statewide officers plus subchapter directors), statewide officers (President, Vice President, Secretary, Treasurer), service-area directors on the state board, candidacy rules, membership year, annual meeting, committees, subchapter structure, amendments, and ratification.
geographic_coverage: Michigan (statewide, organized into DDS service-area subchapters)

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — Michigan Chapter
source.title: Constitution of the Michigan Chapter of the National Association of Disability Examiners

notes: Authoritative NADE chapter governing document. This is the markitdown-normalized markdown conversion of the sibling source file 'Michigan-Const-Bylaws.doc' (in the same directory); markdown formatting (mixed heading levels) was machine-derived. The document is titled and structured as a Constitution (the chapter's by-laws proper are not included as a separately headed section in this file). NADE url is the organization site, not a deep link to this document.
